cap_rule: The cap starts at the captured active count. A completion shrinks available WIP; a new moonshot is admitted only by displacing one active lane with a completed, falsified, or shelved-with-state disposition.
no_claim: This file records governance declarations and a live issue-graph consistency check. It does not validate a moonshot, authenticate evidence, or promote any capability.

inventory_snapshot.inactive_rule: Only in_progress is active WIP. Open moonshot Beads are unadmitted backlog; closed moonshot Beads are terminal history. Neither consumes a slot.

falsifier.observation: A registered overlap fixture passes its local retraction, transport, and metric checks but the transported witnesses disagree on the overlap or produce inequivalent resumed solver state.
falsifier.decision_rule: Any reproducible overlap disagreement shelves the global atlas theorem and retains only the locally verified manifold operations.

active_lanes.critical_path_disjointness: This research theorem ratchet may not be a blocking dependency of any Bead referenced by the EXTREAL capability graph; the established local manifold implementation remains the fallback.

quarterly_review.required_evidence: overlap-cocycle fixtures, independent residuals, and replay identities

falsifier.observation: A symmetry, convolution, modular-reconstruction, or certificate shortcut selects a candidate different from exhaustive exact CBC or cannot verify the exact minimum within its declared bound.
falsifier.decision_rule: The shortcut is falsified and removed from the admitted path; exhaustive exact CBC remains the boring baseline.

active_lanes.critical_path_disjointness: Exact-CBC acceleration is optional research and may not block any EXTREAL capability Bead; the bounded exhaustive exact constructor is the fallback.

quarterly_review.required_evidence: matched exact minima, certificate-checker results, and bound-exhaustion cases

falsifier.observation: An admitted fixture lacks an exact unimodular witness, changes its integer periods under relabeling or refinement, or uses abstract torsion as evidence for an unrealizable three-dimensional material topology.
falsifier.decision_rule: The affected theorem scope is falsified and demoted to the independently verified algebra-kernel subset.

active_lanes.critical_path_disjointness: Integral relative-topology research is outside the Cooling 0.1 critical path and may not block a referenced capability Bead.

quarterly_review.required_evidence: exact normal forms, unimodular witnesses, and physical-realizability separation

falsifier.observation: A finite registered microcase violates a declared kernel-image equality, degree convention, coefficient separation, or relative-boundary exactness claim.
falsifier.decision_rule: The failed theorem node is falsified; only weaker nodes whose executable exactness checks remain green survive.

active_lanes.critical_path_disjointness: Differential-character theorem work is an off-path ratchet and may not block any EXTREAL capability Bead.

quarterly_review.required_evidence: typed exact-sequence microcases, degree mutations, and independent cohomology checks

falsifier.observation: A preregistered endpoint, degeneracy, neutral-signature, non-Fredholm, contour, or essential-spectrum case violates a claimed signed-count equality under the theorem node's own hypotheses.
falsifier.decision_rule: That theorem node is falsified and the implication lattice falls back to the strongest surviving restricted statement.

active_lanes.critical_path_disjointness: The spectral-flow bridge is theorem research outside the product path and may not block an EXTREAL capability Bead.

quarterly_review.required_evidence: theorem-statement review, registered convention mutations, and retained counterexamples

falsifier.observation: A registered map presented as an equivalence lacks a constructive inverse, breaks composition or identity, reverses evidence variance, or strengthens proof authority after a lossy mapping.
falsifier.decision_rule: The equivalence or variance claim is falsified and the map is retained only as its weaker typed morphism or correspondence.

active_lanes.critical_path_disjointness: Derived-geometry categorical machinery is off the EXTREAL product path and may not block any referenced capability Bead.

quarterly_review.required_evidence: constructive equivalence witnesses, variance mutations, and authority anti-strengthening checks

falsifier.observation: A preregistered rank-deficient fixture yields a different canonical rank profile, R factor, or null-space gauge under two admitted deterministic TSQR tree regroupings, or the independent checker cannot certify the separation hypotheses.
falsifier.decision_rule: Do not admit global canonicality; retain deterministic TSQR plus a typed ambiguity or no-claim result and preserve the counterexample.

candidate.critical_path_disjointness: The open rank-deficient TSQR theorem Bead has no direct or transitive blocking path into the EXTREAL graph and receives no product-path capacity.

quarterly_review.required_evidence: rank-deficient regrouping fixtures, independent gauge checks, and typed ambiguity cases

displaces.reason: Rehearsal only: preserve the theorem statement, 14-test bridge battery, and pending independent theorem review before releasing its slot.

transcript: terminal disposition with retained state: yes
